channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Important Information on Traffic and Access for Sunday’s Soweto Derby
item.description: Ahead of the highly anticipated Soweto derby at FNB Stadium, organisers have put several measures in place to manage the large crowds expected. Gates will open an hour earlier than usual at 10am to ea...

item.title: Kash Patel's swift actions during shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel reacted quickly and decisively during a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which took place at the Washington Hilton. The shooter opened fire in the l...

item.title: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee interrupts Bhowanipore rally over alleged BJP disturbance
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee prematurely concluded her public rally in Bhowanipore this Saturday, citing intentional disruption by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The Chief Minister al...

item.title: Arthur Zwane draws on team spirit and faith as AmaZulu targets CAF qualification
item.description: Arthur Zwane, coach of AmaZulu, remains hopeful after the team’s emphatic 5-1 win over Chippa United. With a young squad, some players still of school-going age, AmaZulu have established themselves am...

item.title: Impact of Iran Conflict: Rising Food and Fuel Prices Could Persist for Months
item.description: Darren Jones, a prominent UK politician, has warned that the effects of the ongoing conflict in Iran may cause a lasting impact on food and fuel prices. These prices could remain elevated for over eig...

item.title: Consultant Shot Dead in Calamba Ambush
item.description: A company consultant was shot dead in a brazen ambush in Calamba, Laguna, on the afternoon of April 26, 2026. Authorities have launched an investigation into the incident but have not disclosed furthe...

item.title: Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner leaves one Secret Service agent injured
item.description: The United States has experienced another instance of political violence during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, where a suspected lone gunman opened fire. Amid the chaos, one Secret Service ag...

item.title: Saskatchewan Eliminates Mandatory Movie Rating Requirement for Local Filmmakers
item.description: The Saskatchewan government has decided to remove the mandatory movie rating rule, a move hailed by local filmmakers as a positive development for the province's film industry. Previously, films had t...

item.title: Canadian fans celebrate Dustin Wolf's memorable gesture to young hockey fan
item.description: In a heartwarming moment that captured the spirit of Canadian hockey, Calgary Flames goalie Dustin Wolf handed his CCM stick to a 10-year-old fan, creating a viral moment cherished across the country....

item.title: B.C. Conservative Leadership Race: Culture Wars and Reconciliation Politics Take Centre Stage
item.description: The B.C. Conservative leadership race is seeing candidates like Yuri Fulmer, Caroline Elliott, and Iain Black embrace controversial issues such as reconciliation politics, Indigenous rights, and cultu...

item.title: Swiss International flight aborts takeoff in New Delhi, injuring five
item.description: Swiss International Airlines reported that a flight from New Delhi to Zurich was forced to abort its takeoff early on April 26, 2026, after one of the engines encountered a technical issue. The airlin...

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Ends Relationship with Klay Thompson Over Infidelity Allegations
item.description: Megan Thee Stallion has officially ended her relationship with NBA player Klay Thompson after about nine months together. The Grammy-winning rapper took to Instagram on 25 April 2026 to accuse Thompso...

item.title: Experts Criticize Australia's $4.2 Billion Investment in US Nuclear Submarines
item.description: A new contract between the US and Australia has stirred controversy as experts criticize Australia's $4.2 billion taxpayer-funded payment for nuclear-powered submarines. The deal, signed as part of th...

item.title: Erika Kirk evacuated safely after gunfire at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Erika Kirk, widow of Charlie Kirk, was quickly escorted to safety after a gunman opened fire at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner held at the Washington Hilton on Saturday evening. The incident o...

item.title: Shooter detained after incident at White House Correspondents’ Association dinner
item.description: The White House Correspondents’ Association dinner at the Washington Hilton was disrupted when a gunman opened fire, forcing attendees to take cover and evacuate the venue. US President Donald Trump c...

item.title: Authorities Investigate Home Connected to WHCD Shooting Suspect
item.description: CNN reports from outside a residence connected to Cole Allen, the 31-year-old individual taken into custody by U.S. authorities following the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinne...

item.title: Edwin Sifuna and Linda Mwananchi Team's Tour in Kisumu Sparks Political Tensions
item.description: The recent political rally by the ODM Linda Mwananchi team in Kisumu, led by Nairobi senator Edwin Sifuna, Siaya governor James Orengo, and Embakasi East MP Babu Owino, has caused mixed reactions amon...

item.title: Infowars Bankruptcy Plan Allows The Onion to Acquire Brand, Alex Jones Responds with Sandy Hook Attacks
item.description: Far-right figure Alex Jones is facing the imminent loss of his Infowars media empire due to spreading false and defamatory information about the families of the victims of the 2012 Sandy Hook Elementa...

item.title: Paralyzed Parrot Rides Drone to Fly Again
item.description: A heartwarming story from Davao City where a paralyzed lovebird parrot has made an inspiring return to flight, thanks to a drone. The bird, previously unable to fly due to its paralysis, now soars thr...

item.title: UAAP Season 88 3x3 tips off with FIBA-experienced players boosting competition
item.description: The UAAP Season 88 3x3 basketball tournament has officially opened, bringing renewed excitement to the collegiate halfcourt format. A key highlight of this year’s competition is the participation of p...
